claim: No Stable, release, complete conformance, manual assistive-technology, or distribution parity claim is made.

semantics.rolePolicy: Streaming content is not a live region by default; completion is announced only when explicitly enabled.

nonColor: The visible status text, native open state and optional numeric progress accompany color.
responsive: Summary and content wrap; reduced motion removes transitions and no layout depends on animation.
privacy: Consumers should provide concise, user-approved process summaries rather than private chain-of-thought or hidden system/model traces.
consumerResponsibilities: Do not expose private chain-of-thought, credentials, system prompts or hidden model traces.
Localize summary, status, progress and completion text.
Use announcements sparingly after manual screen-reader review.
